# Elections Bulgaria — electionsbg.com

> Open-source platform for visualizing and analyzing every Bulgarian parliamentary election since 2005 — broken down by region (oblast), municipality (obshtina), settlement, and polling section — plus dashboards for the resulting parliament, the state budget, public procurement, MP business connections and declared assets, polling-agency accuracy, and an electoral-risk screening index. Source data comes from the Central Election Commission (ЦИК), Sofia's Сметна палата (campaign finance + assets), parliament.bg, Eurostat, World Bank WGI, the Bulgarian Court of Audit and АОП. Everything is reprocessed offline into static JSON served from a JAMstack SPA.

Site language: primary Bulgarian, with full English UI translation. Every page is prerendered into static HTML at build time, so non-JS crawlers see the real content. All data is public-domain; the site is open source.

## What this site contains

- Per-election results for all 13 parliamentary votes from 2005 onward, including the early-election cycles of 2021–2026.
- Geographic drill-down: 28 МИР (multi-member districts) → 265 municipalities → ~5,300 settlements → ~12,000 polling sections.
- Machine-vote vs. paper-vote breakdowns, recount metrics, invalid-ballot rates, and section-level anomaly detection.
- Per-party results across time (rise-and-fall timeline), declared campaign financing, and donor lists.
- Parliament dashboards: roll-call cohesion, MP business-connection graph (Commerce Registry crossed with declarations), declared assets/cars rankings.
- State budget execution (КФП + ministry "Отчет за изпълнението на програмния бюджет"), public procurement (АОП contracts, debarred-supplier register), regional indicators (Eurostat NUTS-3, unemployment, education).
- Composite electoral-risk index and interactive simulator for coalition formation and seat allocation.

## Key URLs

- [Home](https://electionsbg.com/): overview, latest election headline, dashboard tiles.
- [About](https://electionsbg.com/about): methodology, data sources, team.
- [Articles](https://electionsbg.com/articles): long-form analytical pieces; each article also available as raw Markdown at `/articles/{slug}-bg.md` and `/articles/{slug}-en.md`.
- [Elections](https://electionsbg.com/elections): every parliamentary vote from 2005 with national + regional drill-down.
- [Parties](https://electionsbg.com/parties): full party list for the latest vote, votes / share / seats.
- [Regions (28 MIR)](https://electionsbg.com/regions): results across the 28 multi-member districts.
- [Sofia](https://electionsbg.com/sofia): Sofia-only view across MIR 23/24/25.
- [Compare](https://electionsbg.com/compare): side-by-side comparison of any two parliamentary votes.
- [Timeline](https://electionsbg.com/timeline): bubble-timeline of every party's share across all 13 votes.
- [Simulator](https://electionsbg.com/simulator): coalition + seat-allocation what-if tool.
- [Polls](https://electionsbg.com/polls): polling-agency accuracy tracker, per-vote miss profile.
- [Governance scorecard](https://electionsbg.com/governance): cabinet stability, institutional trust, WGI indicators, OSCE/ODIHR cycle.
- [Parliament](https://electionsbg.com/parliament): MP roster, party seats, per-MP profiles.
- [Parliament cohesion](https://electionsbg.com/parliament/cohesion): intra- and cross-party roll-call cohesion.
- [Parliament embedding](https://electionsbg.com/parliament/embedding): 2-D embedding of MPs from roll-call voting behavior.
- [MP business connections](https://electionsbg.com/connections): graph of declared business ties between MPs and companies.
- [MP assets](https://electionsbg.com/mp-assets): declared net-worth rankings (property, vehicles, holdings).
- [MP cars](https://electionsbg.com/mp-cars): declared vehicles, ranked by value with typo guards.
- [Officials declarations](https://electionsbg.com/officials): cabinet members, deputy ministers, agency heads, regional governors.
- [State budget](https://electionsbg.com/budget): consolidated execution, ministry-by-ministry plan vs actual, COFOG breakdown, EU peer comparison.
- [Public procurement](https://electionsbg.com/procurement): all АОП contracts since the dataset starts, debarred-supplier flags, MP-connection cross-reference.
- [Party financing](https://electionsbg.com/financing): declared campaign income and expenditures from Сметна палата.
- [Regional indicators](https://electionsbg.com/indicators): GDP per capita, unemployment, net migration, education scores by NUTS-3 / municipality.
- [Risk analysis](https://electionsbg.com/risk-analysis): composite electoral-risk index across 5 process signals + 4 context signals.
- [Sitemap index](https://electionsbg.com/sitemap_index.xml): index of per-bucket sitemaps (~78,000 URLs total).
- [Full corpus (BG)](https://electionsbg.com/llms-full.txt): national summary, per-party retrospect, polling analysis, and full article texts — Bulgarian.
- [Full corpus (EN)](https://electionsbg.com/llms-full.en.txt): same content, English.

## Featured analyses

> All long-form analytical articles, most recent first. Each is published in Bulgarian and English with a raw-Markdown URL for direct ingestion.

- [A budget scorecard for Bulgaria — five risks, five opportunities](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-05-19-budget-scorecard) (English) / [Табло за оценка на държавния бюджет — пет риска и пет възможности](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-19-budget-scorecard) (Bulgarian) — A structured read of Bulgaria's state budget, pinned to specific tiles on the /budget dashboard. Analysis of the new proposal to raise the maximum insurable income to €2,300, plan-versus-actual ministry deviations, the social-functions concentration of spending, and the post-euro fiscal headroom. Markdown: [2026-05-19-budget-scorecard-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-19-budget-scorecard-en.md) · [2026-05-19-budget-scorecard-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-19-budget-scorecard-bg.md).
- [A governance scorecard for Bulgaria — seven risks, six opportunities](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-05-18-governance-scorecard) (English) / [Табло за оценка на управлението в България — седем риска и шест възможности](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-18-governance-scorecard) (Bulgarian) — A structured read of Bulgarian governance, pinned to specific tiles on the /governance dashboard. What the data says about cabinet stability, institutional trust, WGI scores, debt and budget — and where on the dashboard to check live values. Markdown: [2026-05-18-governance-scorecard-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-18-governance-scorecard-en.md) · [2026-05-18-governance-scorecard-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-18-governance-scorecard-bg.md).
- [The state's money: the new public-procurement module and MPs' business connections](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-05-13-procurement) (English) / [Държавните пари: Новият модул за обществени поръчки и връзките на депутатите с бизнеса](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-13-procurement) (Bulgarian) — What the new public-procurement tracking tool is, where the data comes from (over 244,000 contracts), and how the system filters out name matches to surface the real connections. Markdown: [2026-05-13-procurement-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-13-procurement-en.md) · [2026-05-13-procurement-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-13-procurement-bg.md).
- [Election risk screening — new tools for the 19.04.2026 vote](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-04-19-risk-screening) (English) / [Скрининг на изборния риск — нови инструменти за вота на 19.04.2026](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-risk-screening) (Bulgarian) — Composite index (47/100, High risk) from five process-integrity signals, plus four context signals (Benford, neighborhood swing, electoral volatility, polling error). Per-section risk screening (10 Critical out of 12,705) and per-party Benford 2BL. Aligned with the international electoral-integrity frameworks. Markdown: [2026-04-19-risk-screening-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-risk-screening-en.md) · [2026-04-19-risk-screening-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-risk-screening-bg.md).
- [Following the money trail — a tour of the new MP business connections feature](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-05-04-mp-connections) (English) / [По следите на търговските връзки — преглед на новия модул за бизнес-връзки на народните представители](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-04-mp-connections) (Bulgarian) — What the new MP business-connections graph is, where the data comes from, how to read it, and a worked example of a cross-party ownership path between two sitting MPs. Markdown: [2026-05-04-mp-connections-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-04-mp-connections-en.md) · [2026-05-04-mp-connections-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-05-04-mp-connections-bg.md).
- [Election Integrity Analysis — 19.04.2026 vs prior cycles](https://electionsbg.com/en/articles/2026-04-19-integrity) (English) / [Анализ на почтеността на изборите от 19.04.2026](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-integrity) (Bulgarian) — Comparative analysis across 12 elections (2009-2026): flash-memory anomalies, turnout, protest vote, risk neighborhoods and polling. Markdown: [2026-04-19-integrity-en.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-integrity-en.md) · [2026-04-19-integrity-bg.md](https://electionsbg.com/articles/2026-04-19-integrity-bg.md).

## URL patterns

- `/party/{nickName}` — results for a specific party across years and territories. Sub-paths: `/regions`, `/municipalities`, `/settlements`, `/preferences`, `/donors`, `/income`, `/expenses`.
- `/municipality/{oblastCode}` — oblast-level results and per-section anomalies.
- `/settlement/{ekatte}` — settlement-level results by section.
- `/section/{sectionId}` — individual polling-section detail.
- `/candidate/{name}` — candidate profile with sub-paths `/regions`, `/municipalities`, `/settlements`, `/sections`, `/donations`, `/connections`, `/assets`.
- `/elections/{YYYY_MM_DD}` — landing for one parliamentary vote (national + regional).
- `/reports/{level}/{metric}` — analytical reports (turnout, concentration, gainers/losers, invalid ballots, additional voters, supports-no-one, problem sections) at municipality, settlement, or section level.
- `/articles/{slug}` — long-form analytical articles. Each article is also available as raw Markdown at `/articles/{slug}-bg.md` and `/articles/{slug}-en.md` for direct LLM ingestion.
- `/en/...` — every BG URL has an English mirror under `/en/`; both variants declare bidirectional `hreflang` alternates.

## Data

Raw inputs are CSV/ZIP/HTML releases from the Central Election Commission (ЦИК), Сметна палата, parliament.bg, data.egov.bg (АОП procurement, budget execution), Eurostat, World Bank WGI, and the Bulgarian Court of Audit. The offline pipeline in `/scripts/` transforms them into static JSON; per-election artifacts live in a GCS bucket (`storage.googleapis.com/data-electionsbg-com`) and the site fetches them via React Query.

## Citation

If you cite results or visualizations from this site, please link to the specific page (e.g. the settlement, party, or article URL) and credit "electionsbg.com". The source code lives at https://github.com/atanasster/data-bg.

## Contact

Questions or corrections: see the About page.
